mechanics.excerpt: If the MedTech Check succeeds the target character I5 sta bilized_ The character who performed MedTech must provide continuing life support to the target: No additional Skill Rolls are required but tne treating character must spend Complex Action every turn ad stay in physical contact with the patient at all times. If life support not maintained tne character reverts to the condition he was before receiving First Aid; resume the countdown t0 death from where you left off.
